name: Oracle — Sovereign Agent Memory Layer
description: Persistent semantic memory infrastructure for autonomous AI agents. pgvector-backed recall with scoped access, clearance levels, multi-agent namespaces, and conflict resolution. Designed to pair with ERC-8004 onchain identity — giving agents verifiable memory linked to their onchain reputation.

services.name: oracle-memory
services.description: Semantic memory store and recall via pgvector embeddings

services.name: oracle-whitepaper
services.description: Oracle Whitepaper v2 — Sovereign Agent Memory Layer
